mapper.select: SELECT A.like_type_id as videoId FROM ( SELECT t1.like_type_id FROM tb_character_like t1 INNER JOIN tb_video t2 ON t1.like_type_id = t2.video_id AND t2.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN t2.disp_start_dtime AND t2.disp_end_dtime WHERE t1.character_no = #{characterNo} AND t1.like_type = 'VIDEO' ORDER BY t1.disp_sn ASC, t1.update_dtime ASC LIMIT #{pageable.offset}, #{pageable.pageSize} ) A

SELECT A.like_type_id AS trackId , A.disp_sn , A.track_nm , A.album_id , A.disp_status_yn AS displayYn , A.agency_id , IF(A.title_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS titleYn , A.create_dtime , A.update_dtime , E.album_img_size AS size , E.album_img_url AS url , 'Y' AS likeYn , IF(A.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR A.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS holdbackYn , IF(A.adult_auth_need_track_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS adultAuthYn , D.artist_id AS artistId , D.artist_nm AS artistNm , F.title AS albumTitle , G.artist_id AS repArtistId , G.artist_nm AS repArtistNm , A.svc_flac_yn FROM ( SELECT t1.like_type_id , t1.disp_sn , t1.update_dtime as like_update_dtime , t2.album_id , t2.reprsnt_artist_id , t2.track_nm , t2.disp_status_yn , t2.agency_id , t2.title_yn , t2.create_dtime , t2.update_dtime , t2.streaming_premium_yn , t2.adult_auth_need_track_yn , t2.pps_yn , t2.svc_flac_yn FROM tb_character_like T1 INNER JOIN tb_track T2 ON T1.like_type_id = T2.track_id WHERE T1.character_no = #{characterNo} AND T1.like_type = 'TRACK' AND T2.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY T1.disp_sn ASC, T1.update_dtime ASC LIMIT #{pageable.offset} , #{pageable.pageSize} ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist C ON A.like_type_id = C.track_id AND C.rp_yn = 'Y' AND C.db_sts = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist D ON C.artist_id = D.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img E ON A.album_id = E.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album F ON A.album_id = F.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist G ON A.reprsnt_artist_id = G.artist_id ORDER BY A.disp_sn ASC, A.like_update_dtime ASC, C.listorder ASC

SELECT L.LIKE_TYPE_ID AS albumId , L.TITLE AS albumTitle , L.RELEASE_YMD AS releaseYmd , IF(L.ALBUM_TP = 'MF', '', L.ALBUM_TP) AS albumType , C.ARTIST_ID AS albumArtistId , C.ARTIST_NM AS albumArtistName , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (F.STYLE_NM) ORDER BY F.STYLE_ID ASC SEPARATOR ','), '앨범 유형 정보가 없습니다.') AS genreStyle , D.ALBUM_IMG_SIZE AS size , D.ALBUM_IMG_URL AS url , G.ARTIST_ID AS albumRepArtistId , G.ARTIST_NM AS albumRepArtistName , 'Y' AS likeYn FROM ( SELECT T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID, T1.DISP_SN, T1.UPDATE_DTIME, T2.TITLE, T2.RELEASE_YMD, T2.ALBUM_TP FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TED_ALBUM T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.ALBUM_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'ALBUM' AND T2.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY T1.DISP_SN ASC, T1.UPDATE_DTIME ASC LIMIT #{pageable.offset}, #{pageable.pageSize}) L LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ALBUMARTIST B ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = B.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST C ON B.ARTIST_ID = C.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_ALBUM_IMG D ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = D.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ALBUMSTYLE E ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = E.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_STYLE F ON E.STYLE_ID = F.STYLE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST G ON G.ARTIST_ID = L.LIKE_TYPE_ID GROUP BY ALBUMID, ALBUMARTISTID, SIZE, ALBUMTITLE, RELEASEYMD, ALBUMTYPE, ALBUMARTISTNAME, URL, LIKEYN, ALBUMREPARTISTID , ALBUMREPARTISTNAME ORDER BY L.DISP_SN ASC, L.UPDATE_DTIME ASC

SELECT L.LIKE_TYPE_ID AS artistId , L.ARTIST_NM AS artistName , L.SEX_CD AS genderCd , L.GRP_CD AS artistGroupType , B.SIZE AS size , B.URL AS url , IFNULL(SUBSTR(L.ACT_START_YMD, 1, 4), NULL) AS actStartYmd , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (D.STYLE_NM) ORDER BY D.STYLE_ID ASC SEPARATOR ','), NULL) AS artistStyle , 'Y' AS likeYn FROM ( SELECT T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID, T1.DISP_SN, T1.UPDATE_DTIME, T2.ARTIST_NM, T2.SEX_CD, T2.GRP_CD, T2.ACT_START_YMD FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TED_ARTIST T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.ARTIST_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'ARTIST' ORDER BY T1.DISP_SN ASC, T1.UPDATE_DTIME ASC LIMIT #{pageable.offset}, #{pageable.pageSize}) L LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTISTIMAGE B ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = B.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTISTSTYLE C ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = C.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_STYLE D ON C.STYLE_ID = D.STYLE_ID GROUP BY ARTISTID, ARTISTNAME, GENDERCD, ARTISTGROUPTYPE, SIZE, URL, ACTSTARTYMD, LIKEYN ORDER BY L.DISP_SN ASC, L.UPDATE_DTIME ASC

SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , L.UPDATE_DTIME FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'CHART') L INNER JOIN TB_CHART A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHART_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_CHART_MUSIC_CONTENT B WHERE A.CHART_ID = B.CHART_ID AND B.DISP_SN = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_TRACK C WHERE B.MUSIC_CONTENT_ID = C.TRACK_ID)) UNION ALL SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , L.UPDATE_DTIME FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'CHNL') L INNER JOIN TB_CHNL A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHNL_ID AND A.DISP_STATUS_TYPE = 'Y' AND A.CHNL_TYPE IN ('MM', 'DJ', 'FLAC', 'AFLO', 'SP') AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_ALBUM_IMG I WHERE A.ALBUM_ID = I.ALBUM_ID)) T1 ORDER BY DISP_SN ASC, UPDATE_DTIME ASC LIMIT #{pageable.offset} , #{pageable.pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TB_TRACK T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.TRACK_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'TRACK' AND T2.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TB_VIDEO T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.VIDEO_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'VIDEO' AND T2.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y' AND now() between T2.DISP_START_DTIME AND T2.DISP_END_DTIME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TED_ALBUM T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.ALBUM_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'ALBUM' AND T2.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE T1 INNER JOIN TED_ARTIST T2 ON T1.LIKE_TYPE_ID = T2.ARTIST_ID WHERE T1.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND T1.LIKE_TYPE = 'ARTIST'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = #{likeType}) L INNER JOIN TB_CHNL A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHNL_ID AND A.DISP_STATUS_TYPE = 'Y' AND A.CHNL_TYPE IN ('MM', 'DJ', 'FLAC', 'AFLO', 'SP') AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_ALBUM_IMG I WHERE A.ALBUM_ID = I.ALBUM_ID)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'CHART') L INNER JOIN TB_CHART A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHART_ID AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_CHART_MUSIC_CONTENT B WHERE A.CHART_ID = B.CHART_ID AND B.DISP_SN = 1 AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM TB_TRACK C WHERE B.MUSIC_CONTENT_ID = C.TRACK_ID))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CHARACTER_LIKE (CHARACTER_NO, LIKE_TYPE, LIKE_TYPE_ID, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, UPDATE_DTIME) VALUES (#{characterNo}, #{likeType}, #{likeTypeId}, 1, now(), now())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_character_like WHERE character_no = #{characterNo}
